name: review-buddy
description: AI-assisted narrative code review for Claude Code — Prologue + risk-rated Chapters over a real git diff.

scripts.verify:dist-fresh: git add --intent-to-add -- src/ui/dist && git diff --exit-code -- src/ui/dist
scripts.verify:prompts-fresh: bun run gen:prompts && git add --intent-to-add -- integrations && git diff --exit-code -- integrations
scripts.verify: bun run test && bun run typecheck && bun run typecheck:ui && bun run test:ui
scripts.verify:ci: bun run test && bun run typecheck && bun run build:ui && bun run test:ui && bun run verify:dist-fresh && bun run verify:prompts-fresh
